subcodes.first_line: Most of the peoples of the world have laid claim, and continue to lay claim, to the recognition of the Ancient King, but only after the rending asunder of the veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکثری از اهل عالم مدعی عرفان مالک قدم بوده و هستند ولکن بعد از خرق حجبات
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
